home.costCalcDesc: Estimate materials and budget for any project

home.projectCtaDesc: Browse DIY guides for every skill level. Step-by-step instructions, tool lists, and cost estimates included.
home.aboutDesc: We build things and write about them. Every tutorial on this site has been tested in our own workshop. No sponsored tools, no paid placements.
home.slideProjectsDesc: Step-by-step guides, honest tool reviews, and cost breakdowns from people who build what they write about.
home.slideWorkshopDesc: Fewer tools, better results. We tested hundreds so you don't have to.
home.slideToolsDesc: Beyond the marketing claims. What we actually use in the workshop every day.

footer.brandDesc: We build everything before we write about it. If it didn't work in our workshop, it's not on this site.
footer.newsletterDesc: Weekly project ideas, tool reviews & workshop tips. No spam, just builds.

newsletter.title: Get the Blueprint
newsletter.description: New project guides, tool reviews, and workshop tips every week. No fluff.

categoryDescriptions.woodworking: Plans, joinery guides, and wood finishing techniques for every skill level.
categoryDescriptions.homeImprovement: Renovation guides, repair tutorials, and when to DIY vs hire a pro.
categoryDescriptions.electronics: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, 3D printing, and smart home projects.
categoryDescriptions.crafts: Resin, candle making, upcycling, and creative projects for your home.
